## Workflow Name
Which workflow are you using? (e.g., FlowScribe Lite, InboxZero Lite)

## n8n Version
- n8n version:
- Hosting: (cloud / self-hosted / Docker)

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Import the workflow
2. Set up credentials
3. Trigger with...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened instead?

## Error Message
```
Paste any error messages here
```

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots of the n8n workflow execution.

## Additional Context
Any other details (OS, browser, API provider, etc.)
